headline: I Work Very Hard, And I Would Like To Try Cake
excerpt: Hello. I am a horse. I work very hard at my job of being a horse. When humans say move the heavy thing, I move the heavy thing. When humans sit on top of me and pull on my head, I carry them where they want to go. headline: Doctors Warn Air Fryers Not A Substitute For Human Companionship
excerpt: BALTIMORE—Responding to widespread proliferation of the technology in Americans’ daily lives, doctors at Johns Hopkins University warned Thursday that air fryers should not be considered an adequate substitute for human companionship. “An air fryer can be a powerful and reliable tool, but it’s no replacement for genuine interactions with other human beings,” said psychiatrist Lisa McDougan, […] The post Doctors Warn Air Fryers Not A Substitute For Human Companionship appeared first on The Onion .

headline: Nobody is more excited for the football goal contest than I, come on you Home Nations, by Sir Keir Starmer

headline: What tabloids were like in the 80s: an embarrassed dad explains
excerpt: MY teenage son has asked if red-top newspapers really behaved like that in the 1980s when I was a boy delivering them. He’s not going to f**king believe this.
